name: ComfyUI Render Readiness
purpose: Check whether local ComfyUI render preparation files are complete before any real image production is attempted.
checks: Dry-run has at least one payload preview
Every preview has an output path
Every preview has positive and negative prompt text
policy: This readiness file does not start image production.
If any check fails, keep the renderer in dry-run mode.
Every generated image must still pass TV Review before assembly.
